text: Which of the listed requirements do not correspond to the present regulation regarding weak link? weak link shall

options.text: A) Be of sufficient strength to permit inflation of the life raft
B) Release the life raft at a depth of not more than 4 meters
C) Not break by force required to full the painter from the life raft container
D) Break under a strain of approximately 2.2 KN

explanation: The weak link is designed to break under a specific strain (approx 2.2 kN) to allow the life raft to float free if the ship sinks. The regulation states it must release at a depth of not more than 4 meters, making option B the incorrect statement relative to design requirements.
